content: The current setup-moonbit README documents an exact version input using the toolchain version-plus-hash form and supports Windows, Ubuntu, and macOS. Tag v1.22 resolves to commit bdc8c076af1f4c5012a6ac3451a2009ec75bf921. Use that full SHA with version 0.1.20260713+75c7e1f, then fail closed by checking moon, moonc, and moonrun outputs against checked-in policy. The official MoonBit curated list links to this third-party action.
